02

BROOKINGS PUBLIC LIBRARY

 

CITY OF BROOKINGS, South DAKOTA

2.1: Enscape Render / Center Atrium

2.2: Center Atrium Water Collection Graphic

2.3: Floorplan Level 1

2.4: Floorplan Level 2

2.5: 3D Printed Detail Model - Biophilic Shelves

2.6: North Building Section

2.7: Large Model / Detail of Central Atrium

2.8: Large Model / Building Entrance

 

Project Brief: This studio focused on designing a new public library for Brookings, South Dakota. The project included a real client, collaboration with the city, and conversations with the head librarian of the Brookings Public Library. Our studio worked in teams of eight, with Tylan Bear and myself leading Composite Collective and Design. This experience strengthened my communication and team management skills, while my main contributions included the central biophilic atrium, shelving studies, digital modeling, and managing the Revit file.

 

Team Members: (year)

Tylan Bear (4), Uri Goedert (3), Jackson Rogers (3), Emma Greenfield (2), Katilyn Goettl-Rutt (3) Connor Anderson (2), Leo Scholten (2)
